_doc: Story 6.5 (FR19) — EN tail-scene placeholder copy. Reviewer @TBD-en-clinical-register pending equivalent of Gates 9c/9d for EN. NOT clinical-register-reviewed; real copy lands when an EN reviewer-of-record is named. clinicalRegisterReviewed must remain false until then.

bottom-decile.heading: Your result
bottom-decile.copy: This result is one estimate. It does not define you. The numbers below are entry points into the methodology, not a verdict. Resources are listed if you want them.
bottom-decile.silentCompanionLine: The methodology pages and resources are here when you want them.

mid-band.heading: Your result
mid-band.copy: This estimate sits within the middle range of the screener's norming sample. The methodology pages explain what the percentile and the IQ-scale value mean and what this measure does not capture.

top-decile.heading: Your result
top-decile.copy: This estimate sits in the top decile of the screener's norming sample. The screener is not a credential. The number is a screening output, not a placement test or employment qualification.
